summary: The diff modifies App.tsx to display a combined partner logos image on a light/white background, replacing individual logo elements. However, the actual light-background image file (partner-logos-light.dim_1320x860.png) is not present in the diff as an added file, and the App.tsx content is truncated so we cannot fully verify the image source path or section implementation details. The project_state.json still shows both AR-1 and AR-2 as 'pending', which raises concerns about completion.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate a version of the uploaded logos image with a clean white or light neutral background instead of the dark/black background, preserving all logos at full visibility, saved as partner-logos-light.dim_1320x860.png.
missing_requirements.reason: No new image file was added in the diff. The 'ADDED FILES' section shows 'none', meaning the light-background combined logos image (partner-logos-light.dim_1320x860.png) was not saved to frontend/public/assets/generated/ as required.
